meta.title: AzadLink — Free Internet for All
meta.description: AzadLink is a non-profit organization fighting internet censorship. Connecting millions in Iran, China, Russia, and beyond to the free internet.

hero.headline: The Internet Is a Human Right
hero.subheadline: We build bridges where walls are raised. AzadLink connects millions of people in censored regions to the free and open internet.

globe.title: Global Reach, Real Impact
globe.subtitle: Every dot on this globe represents real connections from people accessing the free internet through AzadLink. Live data from our servers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: AzadLink is a non-profit, volunteer-driven organization founded by a group of Iranians. We believe access to information is a fundamental human right. Our distributed network of servers provides secure, uncensored internet access to millions — primarily in Iran, but also in China, Russia, and other regions where the internet is restricted.

about.title: About AzadLink
about.originText: AzadLink was founded by Amin Alam and a group of passionate Iranians who experienced internet censorship firsthand. What started as a small effort to help friends and family access the free internet has grown into a global movement, connecting over 3.3 million people to uncensored information.
about.missionText: In Iran, China, Russia, and many other countries, governments systematically block websites, social media, and communication tools. This digital oppression silences voices, disrupts education, and isolates communities from the rest of the world. AzadLink exists to break these barriers.
about.nonProfitText: AzadLink is a virtual non-profit organization. Every server, every line of code, every hour of support is contributed by volunteers who believe in digital freedom. We do not profit from our work — we do it because it matters.
about.techText: We operate a sophisticated, distributed infrastructure using multiple cutting-edge protocols to stay ahead of censorship systems:

protocols.vless: VLESS Reality & WebSocket — Next-generation proxy protocol with advanced traffic obfuscation
protocols.shadowsocks: Shadowsocks — Battle-tested encrypted proxy designed to bypass firewalls
protocols.wireguard: WireGuard — Modern, high-performance VPN with state-of-the-art cryptography
protocols.mtproxy: MTProxy — Telegram-native proxy for secure messaging access

members.title: Our Team
members.subtitle: The people behind the movement
members.founderBio: Iranian technologist and digital rights advocate. Founded AzadLink to fight internet censorship and provide free, secure internet access to millions. Leads infrastructure architecture, security operations, and the growing volunteer network.
members.joinText: AzadLink is built by volunteers from around the world. Whether you're a developer, designer, sysadmin, translator, or advocate — there's a place for you.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting connected to the free internet takes just a few minutes.
howItWorks.step1Text: Visit @AzadLinkIran on Telegram to get the latest server configurations. Our bot provides fresh, working configs daily.
howItWorks.step2Text: Choose from multiple protocol options (VLESS, Shadowsocks, WireGuard) based on your needs. Copy the config link provided.
howItWorks.step3Text: Open a compatible VPN app (v2rayNG, Nekoray, Shadowrocket, etc.) and import the configuration with one tap.
howItWorks.step4Text: That's it. You now have uncensored access to the entire internet. Your connection is encrypted and secure.
howItWorks.securityText: All our protocols use modern encryption. We don't log your activity. Our infrastructure is designed with privacy at its core — because your freedom depends on it.

donate.title: Support the Cause
donate.subtitle: Your contribution directly powers internet freedom for millions.
donate.impactText: Every donation helps us maintain and expand our server network, develop better anti-censorship tools, and reach more people in need. AzadLink is 100% funded by donations and volunteer efforts.
donate.donateText: We are currently setting up secure donation channels. Please check back soon or contact us via Telegram for donation inquiries.
donate.transparencyText: As a non-profit, we are committed to full financial transparency. Every dollar donated goes directly to infrastructure costs — server hosting, bandwidth, and domain registrations. No salaries, no overhead.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AzadLink
faq.a1: Yes, completely free. AzadLink is a non-profit organization. We provide free VPN and proxy services to anyone living under internet censorship. We rely on donations and volunteer contributions.
faq.q2: Is it safe to use AzadLink?
faq.a2: We take security extremely seriously. All our connections use modern, strong encryption protocols (VLESS Reality, Shadowsocks, WireGuard). We do not log user activity. Our infrastructure is designed to protect your privacy and anonymity.
faq.a3: AzadLink works on Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux. We provide configurations compatible with popular VPN clients like v2rayNG, Nekoray, Shadowrocket, Hiddify, and more.
faq.a4: Join our Telegram channel @AzadLinkIran, where our bot provides fresh server configurations daily. Copy a config, import it into your VPN app, and you're connected. It takes less than 2 minutes.
faq.q5: Why do you use multiple protocols?
faq.a5: Censorship systems like Iran's and China's are sophisticated. By supporting multiple protocols (VLESS, Shadowsocks, WireGuard, MTProxy), we ensure that if one method is blocked, others remain available. This redundancy keeps our users connected.
faq.a6: Absolutely! We welcome developers, system administrators, translators, designers, and anyone passionate about internet freedom. Reach out to us via our Telegram channel to get involved.
faq.a7: AzadLink was founded by Amin Alam and is run by a dedicated team of volunteers from around the world. We are a non-profit, virtual organization with no commercial interests.
faq.a8: While AzadLink was founded to help Iranians, we serve anyone facing internet censorship. Our users include people from China, Russia, and many other countries with restricted internet access.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.telegramText: Our primary communication channel. Get configs, updates, and support.
contact.emailText: For partnerships, media inquiries, and formal communications.
contact.socialText: Stay updated with our latest news and developments.
contact.volunteerText: Join our growing team of digital freedom fighters. We need developers, sysadmins, translators, and advocates.

footer.tagline: Building bridges where walls are raised.
footer.rights: AzadLink is a non-profit, volunteer-driven organization. Free internet for all.
